lede: A look at September 25 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Leah Jeffries and Kyle Bennett (BMX rider), and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Bill Cosby
events.desc: Bill Cosby is sentenced to three to ten years in prison for aggravated sexual assault.

events.title: Maze Prison escape
events.desc: Thirty-eight IRA prisoners, armed with six handguns, hijack a prison meals lorry and smash their way out of the Maze Prison.

events.title: Chicago Marathon
events.desc: About 4,200 people take part in the first running of the Chicago Marathon.

events.title: Organisation of Islamic Cooperation
events.desc: The charter establishing the Organisation of Islamic Cooperation is signed.

events.title: North Yemen civil war
events.desc: The North Yemen Civil War begins when Abdullah al-Sallal dethrones the newly crowned Imam al-Badr and declares Yemen a republic under his presidency.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: Surviving elements of the British 1st Airborne Division withdraw from Arnhem via Oosterbeek.

events.title: Battle of Megiddo (1918)
events.desc: World War I: The end of the Battle of Megiddo, the climax of the British Army's Sinai and Palestine campaign under General Edmund Allenby.

events.title: Sequoia National Park
events.desc: The United States Congress establishes Sequoia National Park.

events.title: American Revolutionary War
events.desc: American Revolutionary War: Ethan Allen surrenders to British forces after attempting to capture Montreal in the Battle of Longue-Pointe during the invasion of Quebec.

events.title: Benedict Arnold
events.desc: American Revolutionary War: Benedict Arnold's expedition to Quebec sets off to join the American invasion.

births.name: Lope K. Santos
births.line: Filipino lawyer and politician, 4th Governor of Rizal (died 1963)

deaths.text: Franco Modigliani, Italian-American economist and academic, Nobel Prize laureate
Richard F. Outcault, American cartoonist, created The Yellow Kid and Buster Brown

observances.text: Christian feast day: Abadir and Iraja and Companions (Coptic Church)
